title: Maintenance harness skeleton
objective: Add a Maintenance Harness skeleton for dependency updates, security triage, bugfix tasks, and incident/postmortem reports.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Generate .harness/maintenance/ configuration with dependency, security, bugfix, and incident templates.
Define maintenance task packet types and default verification commands.
Add incident-report.md and postmortem.md templates for Target Repos.
Support creating a maintenance backlog item from a structured input file.
Add fixture-based tests for maintenance template generation.

expectedArtifacts: tests or fixtures when behavior changes
updated documentation if user-facing behavior changes
koObjective: 의존성/보안/장애 대응 작업 흐름 skeleton을 만든다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
